title: GST/HST rebate – Non-registered non-resident recipient of a taxable supply of an installation service – rebate paid or credited by registered supplier - Canada.ca
content:
## GST/HST rebate – Non-registered non-resident recipient of a taxable supply of an installation service – rebate paid or credited by registered supplier
Form GST189 – Reason code 10
Reason code 10 provides a rebate of the GST/HST paid by non-registered non-residents on taxable supplies of an installation service if the rebate was paid or credited by the registered supplier ( subsection 252.41(2) of the Excise Tax Act ).

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
